help.operation_notes:
Left drag: create note
Alt + left drag: create Bezier/Glide note (shape is selected by Curve)
Left click: move playhead / select note
Ctrl + left click: add/remove multiple selection
Shift + left click: range selection
Right click: delete note
Space: play/pause
Snap: snap to BPM grid
